languages.text: Судно Себериана фон Валанциус бесследно исчезло в пустоте за пределами протектората. Некоторое время на флагман приходили астропатические сообщения с отчетами о зловещих чудесах и неописуемых ужасах, встреченных Себерианом, однако спустя несколько лет прекратились и они. В последнем из сообщений оживший предок династии фон Валанциус обещал принести династии прощальный подарок, однако его судно больше никогда не пересекало границы известного Человечеству космоса.

Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of Seberian's encounters with ominous wonders and inconceivable horrors, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

languages.text: バルアンシウス家の船は、保護領の境界を超えた虚無の海に消えてしまった。しばらくの間、旗艦はバルアンシウス家の船からのアストロパシー通信を受け、彼の信じられない冒険や騒動について報告を受けたが、数年後、その通信も途絶えた。最後の通信では、バルアンシウス家の祖先が王家に別れを告げる贈り物を届けることを約束したが、彼の船は人類が知る宇宙の境界を超えることは二度となかった。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of his incredible adventures and escapades, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

traits.locale_text: バルアンシウス家の船は、保護領の境界を超えた虚無の海に消えてしまった。しばらくの間、旗艦はバルアンシウス家の船からのアストロパシー通信を受け、彼の信じられない冒険や騒動について報告を受けたが、数年後、その通信も途絶えた。最後の通信では、バルアンシウス家の祖先が王家に別れを告げる贈り物を届けることを約束したが、彼の船は人類が知る宇宙の境界を超えることは二度となかった。

languages.text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的舰船在属地边界之外的虚空中消失得无影无踪。此后的一段时间里，旗舰仍能收到星语信息，汇报他那些匪夷所思的冒险奇遇；但几年后，连此类消息也不再有了。在最后一份消息中，这位复活的冯·瓦兰修斯家族先祖许诺会给王朝送上一份告别礼物，但他的舰船再也没有出现在人类已知星域的边界之内。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of his incredible adventures and escapades, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的舰船在属地边界之外的虚空中消失得无影无踪。此后的一段时间里，旗舰仍能收到星语信息，汇报他那些匪夷所思的冒险奇遇；但几年后，连此类消息也不再有了。在最后一份消息中，这位复活的冯·瓦兰修斯家族先祖许诺会给王朝送上一份告别礼物，但他的舰船再也没有出现在人类已知星域的边界之内。

languages.text: Le vaisseau de Seberian von Valancius se volatilisa dans le vide au-delà des frontières du protectorat. Après sa disparition, le vaisseau amiral reçut pendant un temps des messages astropathiques relatant ses incroyables aventures et escapades, mais au bout de quelques années, ces transmissions cessèrent également. Dans sa dernière communication, l'ancêtre ressuscité de la maison von Valancius promettait d'apporter un cadeau d'adieu à la dynastie, mais son vaisseau ne pénétra plus jamais dans l'espace connu de l'humanité.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of his incredible adventures and escapades, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Le vaisseau de Seberian von Valancius se volatilisa dans le vide au-delà des frontières du protectorat. Après sa disparition, le vaisseau amiral reçut pendant un temps des messages astropathiques relatant ses incroyables aventures et escapades, mais au bout de quelques années, ces transmissions cessèrent également. Dans sa dernière communication, l'ancêtre ressuscité de la maison von Valancius promettait d'apporter un cadeau d'adieu à la dynastie, mais son vaisseau ne pénétra plus jamais dans l'espace connu de l'humanité.

languages.text: La nave de Seberian von Valancius desapareció sin dejar rastro más allá de los límites del protectorado. Durante un tiempo, la nave insignia recibió mensajes Astropáticos sobre sus increíbles aventuras y hazañas, pero, después de unos años, se detuvieron. En su última comunicación, el antecesor resucitado de la casa von Valancius prometió un regalo de despedida a la dinastía, pero su nave jamás volvió a cruzar las fronteras del espacio conocido de la Humanidad.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of his incredible adventures and escapades, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

traits.locale_text: La nave de Seberian von Valancius desapareció sin dejar rastro más allá de los límites del protectorado. Durante un tiempo, la nave insignia recibió mensajes Astropáticos sobre sus increíbles aventuras y hazañas, pero, después de unos años, se detuvieron. En su última comunicación, el antecesor resucitado de la casa von Valancius prometió un regalo de despedida a la dinastía, pero su nave jamás volvió a cruzar las fronteras del espacio conocido de la Humanidad.

languages.text: Seberian von Valancius'un gemisi, protektoranın sınırlarının ötesindeki uçsuzda iz bırakmadan kayboldu. Bir süre boyunca sancak gemisi, onun inanılmaz maceraları ve kaçamaklarıyla ilgili raporlar içeren Astropatik mesajlar alsa da birkaç yıl sonra bunlar da kesildi. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin dirilmiş atası, son mesajında hanedanlığa bir veda hediyesi ulaştıracağına söz verdi ancak gemisi bir daha İnsanlık tarafından bilinen uzayın sınırlarını asla geçmedi.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius's ship vanished without a trace in the void beyond the bounds of the protectorate. For some time after, the flagship received Astropathic messages with reports of his incredible adventures and escapades, but after a few years they stopped as well. In the final dispatch, the resurrected ancestor of House von Valancius promised to deliver a farewell gift to the dynasty, but his ship never again crossed the borders of space known to Humanity.

traits.locale_text: Seberian von Valancius'un gemisi, protektoranın sınırlarının ötesindeki uçsuzda iz bırakmadan kayboldu. Bir süre boyunca sancak gemisi, onun inanılmaz maceraları ve kaçamaklarıyla ilgili raporlar içeren Astropatik mesajlar alsa da birkaç yıl sonra bunlar da kesildi. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin dirilmiş atası, son mesajında hanedanlığa bir veda hediyesi ulaştıracağına söz verdi ancak gemisi bir daha İnsanlık tarafından bilinen uzayın sınırlarını asla geçmedi.

languages.text: Das Schiff von Seberian von Valancius verschwand jenseits der Grenzen des Protektorats spurlos in der Leere. Danach erhielt das Flaggschiff noch einige astropathische Nachrichten mit Berichten über seine unglaublichen Abenteuer und Erlebnisse, die nach einigen Jahren allerdings ausblieben. In seiner letzten Meldung versprach der auferstandene Ahnherr des Hauses von Valancius der Dynastie ein Abschiedsgeschenk, aber sein Schiff sollte die Grenzen des bekannten Weltraums nie wieder überqueren.
